tiles.name: Niches
tiles.description: Venture Capital institution types and market niches

institutions.name: Institutional Venture Capital (GP/LP Model)
institutions.description: Traditional VC firms managing 10-year funds on behalf of Limited Partners.

functions.name: Fund Formation
functions.description: Structuring venture funds and raising capital from LPs.

functions.name: Portfolio Construction
functions.description: Building diversified portfolios across stages and sectors.

functions.name: Investment Committee Governance
functions.description: Internal decision-making framework for approving investments.

functions.name: Exit Strategy Management
functions.description: Managing IPOs, acquisitions, and secondary exits.

institutions.name: Corporate Venture Capital (CVC)
institutions.description: Investment arms of large corporations seeking strategic partnerships and technology insights.

functions.name: Strategic Innovation Scouting
functions.description: Identifying startups aligned with corporate strategy.

functions.name: Technology Integration
functions.description: Connecting startup innovations with corporate product ecosystems.

functions.name: Strategic Partnership Development
functions.description: Facilitating joint ventures or commercial agreements.

functions.name: Competitive Intelligence
functions.description: Monitoring technological disruption in the industry.

institutions.name: Micro-VC & Seed Funds
institutions.description: Small venture funds specializing in pre-seed and seed stage investments.

functions.name: Early Stage Discovery
functions.description: Identifying founders at the earliest company stages.

functions.name: High Conviction Investing
functions.description: Making small but concentrated early bets.

functions.name: Founder Mentorship
functions.description: Helping first-time founders refine product-market fit.

functions.name: Angel & Syndicate Coordination
functions.description: Organizing syndicates of angels and early investors.

institutions.name: Venture Debt Funds
institutions.description: Specialized lenders providing non-dilutive capital to venture-backed startups.

functions.name: Structured Startup Lending
functions.description: Providing loans tailored to startup growth stages.

functions.name: Warrant-Linked Financing
functions.description: Combining debt instruments with equity warrants.

functions.name: Startup Credit Risk Analysis
functions.description: Evaluating financial sustainability of startups.

functions.name: Growth Capital Structuring
functions.description: Designing financing aligned with venture-backed growth.

institutions.name: Accelerators & Venture Builders
institutions.description: Organizations providing early-stage startups with capital, mentorship, and operational support.

functions.name: Startup Incubation
functions.description: Helping founders transform ideas into companies.

functions.name: Mentor Network Coordination
functions.description: Connecting founders with experienced operators.

functions.name: Demo Day Preparation
functions.description: Preparing startups to pitch investors.

functions.name: Venture Building
functions.description: Creating startups internally through structured company building.

tiles.description: Career roles and positions in Venture Capital
